_provenance.description: Hand-curated, wiki-verified production recipes for the cost-layer craft channel. v1 covers the golden-set potion chain (Attack potion via Guam) only; bulk recipe sourcing from the OSRS Wiki production tables is a disclosed v1 follow-up. No live wiki fetch during build. The Vial of water (item:227) record models filling an empty Vial (item:229) at any water source: filling is FREE, so the produced cost is exactly the empty vial -- this gives the potion chain a non-GE route for every input so the iron potion is priceable.

records.name: Attack potion(3)
records.source: Herblore: mix Guam potion (unf) + Eye of newt

records.name: Guam potion (unf)
records.source: Herblore: Guam leaf + Vial of water

records.name: Vial of water
records.source: Fill an empty Vial at any water source (free); cost is the empty vial
